name: Johnathan Tenny
school: School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems
focus: Remote sensing • Data analysis • Research support
bio: Johnathan Taylor Tenny is a Graduate Research Assistant in the School of Informatics, Computing, and Cyber Systems at Northern Arizona University and is also affiliated with the Radiant Center. His work supports interdisciplinary research, data analysis, and collaborative projects across remote sensing and related applied science efforts.
